questions.title: Explain Server and Client Components in Next.js
questions.description: Describe rendering behavior, boundary rules, and when a component should remain on the server.

questions.title: Optimize expensive rendering in React
questions.description: Walk through practical use of memoization, stable callbacks, and derived state to avoid unnecessary renders.

const filteredRows = useMemo(() => rows.filter(matchesQuery), [rows, matchesQuery]);
const onRowSelect = useCallback((id: string) => setSelectedId(id), []);

questions.description: Model success and failure responses using discriminated unions and narrowing.
